scenes.title: The Picnic
scenes.background_prompt: A sunny meadow with a red checkered picnic blanket on green grass, an open wicker picnic basket, wildflowers in purple and yellow, and butterflies. A few trees provide partial shade. No people, no animals.
scenes.full_scene_prompt: A sunny meadow on a warm day. A mother in a light blue sundress with a straw hat sits on a red checkered picnic blanket spread on the green grass. Right next to her, practically shoulder to shoulder, a young girl with brown pigtails tied with pink ribbons and wearing a white t-shirt and denim overalls sits cross-legged. They share a sandwich between them, the mother holding one half and the daughter holding the other, both smiling at each other warmly. An open wicker picnic basket with a red lining sits on the blanket nearby, with a juice box and an apple visible inside. A small white dog with a fluffy coat lies curled up in the grass just off the blanket, dozing in the sun. A butterfly with orange and black wings hovers over a cluster of purple and yellow wildflowers to the left. Dappled shade from a nearby tree falls across part of the blanket.
scenes.composition_instructions: Place mother on the picnic blanket (left side), sitting and holding one half of a sandwich, smiling. Place daughter right next to her, practically shoulder to shoulder, sitting cross-legged and holding the other half, smiling at the mother. Place dog curled up in the grass just off the blanket, dozing.
scenes.scene_description: In the bottom left foreground, a cluster of green plants and flowers in shades of purple, yellow, and pink grows near a large orange and black monarch-style butterfly perched on a blade of grass. Moving right across the foreground, a red and white checkered picnic blanket is spread over the green grass. On the left side of the blanket, a mother with brown hair sits facing right; she wears a wide-brimmed straw hat with a blue ribbon, a green sleeveless dress patterned with yellow sunflowers, and brown sandals. She holds half of a sandwich, offering it to her daughter. The daughter sits on the right side of the blanket, facing her mother; she has brown hair tied in a ponytail with a pink bow and wears a white short-sleeved t-shirt under blue denim overalls with blue and white sneakers. She reaches out with both hands to take the sandwich. To the right of the daughter on the blanket sits a brown wicker picnic basket with a handle; inside are a red-lidded container, a green juice box with a white straw, a red apple, and a long baguette. Further to the right, off the blanket, a small white dog sleeps curled up on the grass surrounded by more purple and yellow flowers. In the midground, a large tree with a thick brown trunk and green leaves stands on the far left. Behind the mother and daughter, two more large trees with rounded canopies—one green and one yellowish-orange—frame the scene. A small purple butterfly flutters in the air near the mother's head. The background features rolling green hills under a bright blue sky filled with several large, fluffy white clouds, suggesting a clear, sunny day. Low green bushes and additional trees are scattered across the distant landscape.
